creator: jhale@FreeBSD.org
text:
That saddens me greatly to hear of the authors passing. His son's Douglas Adams reference lifted me up quite a bit, though. They sound like good people.

Very, sorry your bug#275324 fell off my radar. I was just frantically trying to save as many ports as I could before rene@ extended the EXPIRATION_DATE. I'll assign myself to it and close this one.

Please update your patch against the current ports tree, so it applies cleanly and I'll see to it that René Reucher's legacy carries on a bit longer in the FreeBSD ports tree. Hopefully, someone steps up to carry the torch.

*** This bug has been marked as a duplicate of bug 275324 ***
